'''ât-h-n-j''' ('''katahnejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:item|item]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-h-n-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:item|item]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-h-n-j
|-
! Lemma
| katahnejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitahnejoko|thitahnejoko]] || [[word:jitahnejoko|jitahnejoko]] || [[word:shitahnejoko|shitahnejoko]] || [[word:kitahnejoko|kitahnejoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotahnejoko|thotahnejoko]] || [[word:jotahnejoko|jotahnejoko]] || [[word:shotahnejoko|shotahnejoko]] || [[word:kotahnejoko|kotahnejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚtahnejoko|thĂŚtahnejoko]] || [[word:jĂŚtahnejoko|jĂŚtahnejoko]] || [[word:shĂŚtahnejoko|shĂŚtahnejoko]] || [[word:kĂŚtahnejoko|kĂŚtahnejoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatahnejoko|thatahnejoko]] || [[word:jatahnejoko|jatahnejoko]] || [[word:shatahnejoko|shatahnejoko]] || [[word:katahnejoko|katahnejoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
